feature: Deep Gap Sprint 5 — FIX Gateway TCP
requirement: Add TCP listener, FIX session heartbeat, sequence number persistence, order routing to securities-service

tasks.title: FIX TCP listener + session heartbeat + order routing
tasks.description:
Complete the FIX gateway from codec-only to a functional TCP server.

Read src/fix-gateway/internal/fix/parser.go for message parsing.
Read src/fix-gateway/internal/fix/mapper.go for order mapping.
Read src/fix-gateway/internal/session/manager.go for session management.
Read src/fix-gateway/internal/broker/store.go for broker registry.
Read src/fix-gateway/cmd/fix-gateway/main.go for current setup.

Part A — TCP listener (create src/fix-gateway/internal/server/tcp.go):
- FIXServer struct with listener net.Listener, sessionManager, brokerStore, orderRouter
- Start(addr string) error — listen on TCP port (default 9878)
- For each connection: spawn goroutine handleConnection(conn net.Conn)
- handleConnection: read FIX messages in a loop (delimited by SOH), parse, dispatch by MsgType
- On Logon(A): validate CompID against broker store, create session, send Logon response
- On NewOrderSingle(D): map to SecurityOrder via mapper, route to securities-service, send ExecutionReport back
- On OrderCancelRequest(F): route cancel, send response
- On Heartbeat(0): update session last-recv time
- On Logout(5): close session, close connection
- Graceful shutdown: close listener, close all connections

Part B — Heartbeat timer (add to session/manager.go):
- StartHeartbeat(session, interval time.Duration) — goroutine sends Heartbeat every interval
- MonitorHeartbeat(session) — if no message received within 2*interval, send TestRequest. If no response within interval, disconnect.
- Wire into handleConnection: start heartbeat after successful logon

Part C — Order routing (create src/fix-gateway/internal/router/order_router.go):
- OrderRouter struct with securitiesServiceURL string
- SubmitOrder(order) (*ExecutionReport, error) — HTTP POST to securities-service /api/v1/securities/orders
- CancelOrder(orderID) error — HTTP DELETE
- Add X-GarudaX-Tenant header from session's tenant_id

Part D — Wire into main.go:
- Create FIXServer with all dependencies
- Start TCP listener on FIX_PORT (default 9878)
- Start HTTP admin on 8091
- Graceful shutdown on SIGTERM

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/fix-gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for FIX TCP server + order routing
tasks.description:
Write tests for the FIX TCP server, heartbeat, and order routing.

1. server/tcp_test.go:
- TestFIXServer_Start_Stop — start listener, verify accepting connections, stop gracefully
- TestFIXServer_Logon — connect, send Logon msg, receive Logon response
- TestFIXServer_InvalidCompID — send Logon with unknown CompID → Reject + disconnect
- TestFIXServer_Heartbeat — after logon, send heartbeat → no error

2. router/order_router_test.go:
- TestOrderRouter_SubmitOrder — mock HTTP server, verify request format
- TestOrderRouter_CancelOrder — mock HTTP, verify DELETE
- TestOrderRouter_TenantHeader — verify X-GarudaX-Tenant sent

3. session/manager_test.go — append:
- TestHeartbeatTimer — start heartbeat, verify heartbeat messages sent
- TestHeartbeatTimeout — no messages → session marked stale

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/fix-gateway && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
